en_title: GTA 6 Developers Ask Rockstar for Union Recognition — and They're Prepared to Go to the UK Government if Necessary
cn_title: 《Rockstar》《GTA6》开发者正式申请工会认可，不排除诉诸政府
subtitle: 看点来了
opus_summary: Rockstar《侠盗猎车手6》开发者通过IWGB工会正式申请自愿认可，若成功将成为继《极乐迪斯科》开发商后英国第二家拥有认可工会的游戏工作室。

paragraphs.en: Rockstar developers have applied for voluntary recognition of the IWGB Game Workers Union in a bid to make the Grand Theft Auto 6 developer the second UK games studio with a recognized union.
paragraphs.cn: Rockstar开发人员已申请自愿认可IWGB游戏工人工会，力图让这家《侠盗猎车手6》开发商成为英国第二家拥有认可工会的游戏工作室。

paragraphs.en: If recognized, the union would give its members additional protections and rights via a formal structure for collective bargaining on issues including pay transparency, flexible working, and excessive overtime (crunch), the IWGB said in a statement issued today. Disco Elysium developer ZA/UM is currently the only UK studio with formal union recognition.
paragraphs.cn: IWGB在今日发布的声明中表示，若获得认可，该工会将通过正式集体谈判结构为其成员提供额外保护与权利，谈判议题包括薪酬透明度、灵活工作安排以及过度加班（高强度赶工）。目前，《极乐迪斯科》开发商ZA/UM是英国唯一一家拥有正式工会认可的工作室。

paragraphs.en: The IWGB claims to represent a “significant portion” of the Rockstar workforce across its offices in Edinburgh, Dundee, Lincoln, Leeds, and London, and that its existence has contributed to “unprecedented” average pay rises and financial incentives for crunch for the first time ever.
paragraphs.cn: IWGB声称其代表了Rockstar在爱丁堡、邓迪、林肯、利兹和伦敦各办公室中「相当一部分」员工，并称工会的存在促成了「前所未有的」平均加薪，以及首次对高强度赶工支付经济奖励。

paragraphs.en: Josh Walter, a senior QA tester at Rockstar Lincoln, said: “Rockstar leads the industry in the games we create. We believe it can also lead the industry in how it treats the people who make them. There is so much that is special about the studio and the work we put out. We want to protect that. When people are confronted with pay disparities, excessive overtime or a lack of flexibility in arrangements, they are not in the best position to do their best work. We want to sit down with management and build a future where both the games and the conditions of the people who make them are as strong as possible.”
paragraphs.cn: Josh Walter，Rockstar林肯办公室高级QA测试员，说道：「Rockstar在游戏创作上引领行业。我们相信，它也能在如何对待游戏制作者方面引领行业。这个工作室和我们产出作品中有太多特别之处，我们想要保护这一点。当员工面对薪资差异、过度加班或安排缺乏灵活性的情况时，他们就很难发挥最佳状态。我们希望与管理层坐下来，共同构建一个未来，让游戏作品和我们自己的工作条件都能尽可能强大。」

paragraphs.en: Shanti Easton-Steel, production co-ordinator at Rockstar North, added: “This is a landmark moment for the Rockstar Game Workers Union, and hopefully for the industry as a whole. It’s thanks to the hard work of so many of our members — both those currently with us and those who were fired last October — that we are now in a strong enough position to pursue formal recognition. Whilst it’s painful that our dismissed colleagues are not here to share this milestone moment, the best way we can honour their contribution now is by succeeding in the fight they helped us to start, and making them proud to have been a part of it.
paragraphs.cn: Shanti Easton-Steel，Rockstar North制作协调员，补充道：「这是Rockstar游戏工人工会的一个里程碑时刻，但愿对整个行业也是如此。这要感谢我们许多成员的努力——包括目前在岗的成员和去年十月被解雇的同事们——正是他们的付出让我们今天有足够的底气去争取正式认可。虽然很痛心那些离开了的同事无法与我们共享这一里程碑时刻，但我们能为他们的贡献所做的最好回报，就是赢得这场由他们帮助发起的斗争，并让他们为曾参与其中而感到骄傲。」

paragraphs.en: “This recognition bid only comes after years of effort by our members and could not have happened without the support of many of our non-member colleagues too. We hope lots more people will now feel comfortable to join the union, but even for those that don't, we ask that they remain supportive of the cause as we move forward with momentum towards our key objectives of pay transparency, fairer crunch practices and better flexible working arrangements.”
paragraphs.cn: 「此次认可申请是在我们成员多年努力之后才提出的，也离不开许多非成员同事的支持。我们希望更多人现在能放心加入工会，但就算不加入，我们也请求他们在我们向核心目标——薪酬透明、更公平的赶工待遇和更好的灵活工作安排——迈进时继续支持我们的事业。」

paragraphs.en: A spokesperson from Rockstar Games issued IGN the following statement: “We strive to make the best games possible by giving our talented teams world-class work environments and ongoing career opportunities. We have fostered a culture which is focused on teamwork, excellence, and kindness, and where we support and reward the team across all levels of the business through competitive compensation and benefits policies. We are proud that as a result, our employee retention is well above the industry standard.
paragraphs.cn: Rockstar发言人向IGN提供了如下声明：「我们致力于打造最出色的游戏，为此为才华横溢的团队提供一流的工作环境和持续的职业发展机会。我们营造了一种以团队合作、追求卓越和与人为善为核心的文化，并通过有竞争力的薪酬和福利政策支持和奖励业务中所有层级的员工。我们感到自豪的是，正因如此，我们的员工留存率远高于行业标准。」

paragraphs.en: "We have received a request from a union seeking to discuss voluntary recognition. We value an open and constructive dialogue with all stakeholders and will arrange to meet.”
paragraphs.cn: 「我们已收到一家工会的请求，希望讨论自愿认可事宜。我们重视与所有利益相关方进行开放、建设性的对话，并将安排会面。」

paragraphs.en: The recognition application comes amid an ongoing legal dispute over what the IWGB claims was union busting by Rockstar. Rockstar has insisted the employees it fired late last year were dismissed because they leaked game features for upcoming and unannounced titles in Discord, not because they were trying to unionize. 34 members of staff at Rockstar were dismissed, 31 in the UK and three in Canada, sparking protests outside the office of GTA 6 developer Rockstar North in Edinburgh, Scotland, and outside parent company Take-Two’s office in London.
paragraphs.cn: 在申请认可的同时，IWGB与Rockstar之间正进行着一场法律纠纷，前者指控后者打压工会。Rockstar则坚称，去年年底解雇员工是因为他们在Discord上泄露了即将推出和尚未公布的游戏内容，而非因为他们试图组建工会。Rockstar当时共解雇了34名员工，其中31人在英国，3人在加拿大，此事引发了在苏格兰爱丁堡《GTA6》开发商Rockstar North办公室门外的抗议，以及在其母公司Take-Two的伦敦办公室外的抗议。

paragraphs.en: The IWGB is challenging the dismissals through a Glasgow employment tribunal, which in January rejected an application for interim relief filed on behalf of the fired developers .
paragraphs.cn: IWGB正通过格拉斯哥就业法庭对这些解雇决定提出异议。今年1月，法庭拒绝了代表被解雇开发者提出的临时救济申请。

paragraphs.en: “We welcome the decision, which is consistent with Rockstar’s position throughout," a Rockstar Games spokesperson told IGN at the time. “We regret that we were put in a position where dismissals were necessary, but we stand by our course of action as supported by the outcome of this hearing.”
paragraphs.cn: 当时，Rockstar Games发言人告诉IGN：「我们欢迎这一裁决，这与Rockstar在此事上一贯的立场一致。我们感到遗憾的是，我们被迫走到了不得不解雇员工的这一步，但我们坚持我们的行动方针，此次听证会的结果也支持了我们的做法。」

paragraphs.en: A final hearing is scheduled to begin in September 2026, where it will be decided whether workers were unlawfully fired for trade union activity.
paragraphs.cn: 最终听证会定于2026年9月开始，届时将裁定员工是否因从事工会活动而被非法解雇。

paragraphs.en: This all comes ahead of the launch of GTA 6 in November, which is expected to be the biggest entertainment launch of all time. The IWGB said the opening of preorders last week reportedly generated $3 billion.
paragraphs.cn: 这一切都发生在11月《GTA6》上市之前，外界预计它将成为有史以来规模最大的娱乐产品首发。IWGB称，上周开放预购后，据信已产生30亿美元(约合人民币204亿元)收入。

paragraphs.en: “Many people assumed that Rockstar dismissing 31 union members last year would weaken organising at the company — but in fact the union is now stronger than ever,” Alex Marshall, President of the IWGB Union, said.
paragraphs.cn: 「许多人以为Rockstar去年解雇31名工会成员，会削弱公司内部的组织工作——但事实上，工会现在比以往任何时候都强大。」IWGB工会主席Alex Marshall说道。

paragraphs.en: “Over the last four years, workers have built a significant presence across Rockstar’s sites, and now represent a large proportion of the workforce. Applying for union recognition is the next step in strengthening their presence in the workplace. Rockstar has maintained that it respects workers’ trade union rights. This is now an opportunity for it to demonstrate that in practice.
paragraphs.cn: 「过去四年来，工人们在Rockstar各办公地点建立了显著影响力，如今已代表相当大比例的员工。申请工会认可，是在工作场所进一步加强这种影响力的下一步。Rockstar一直宣称尊重员工的工会权利，现在正是它展现实际行动的机会。」

paragraphs.en: “GTA 6 has reportedly already generated more than $3 billion in preorder sales. Rockstar bosses can easily afford to sit around the table with the people whose hard work created these games, and give them a meaningful voice in their workplace.”
paragraphs.cn: 「《GTA6》据信预购销售额已超过30亿美元(约合人民币204亿元)，Rockstar的老板们完全有条件与用辛勤劳动创作这些游戏的人坐在一起，赋予他们在职场中真正的话语权。」

paragraphs.en: Rockstar can refuse to acknowledge the union, which would then open the door to the IWGB submitting its application for statutory recognition from the Department for Business and Trade's Central Arbitration Committee (CAC). But could its members go on strike? The IWGB told IGN “members will decide on the organising strategy they use to secure” recognition.
paragraphs.cn: Rockstar有权拒绝承认该工会，届时IWGB将转而向英国商业与贸易部下属中央仲裁委员会（CAC）提交法定认可申请。不过，工会成员会罢工吗？IWGB向IGN表示，「成员将自行决定争取认可的组织策略。」

paragraphs.en: Photo by Lesley Martin/PA Images via Getty Images.
paragraphs.cn: 图片由Lesley Martin/PA Images提供，来源：盖蒂图片社。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
